description_long: This is a compact, rectangular radio receiver with a rugged, dark green exterior, designed for durability and portability. The front panel features a large volume dial, a frequency tuning knob, and a horizontal frequency display window marked with FM and MW bands, as well as several labeled buttons and switches. The left side reveals three circular speaker or light elements arranged vertically, while the right side is mostly solid with minimal features. The back panel displays a cross-shaped ventilation grille, a prominent '99' label, and various technical markings and switches, indicating power and operational controls. The top of the device has a handle or bar, likely for carrying, and the overall design suggests it is suitable for outdoor or emergency use. The branding 'ASTRAL' is clearly visible on the front, adding to its identifiable character.
description: A rugged, dark green portable radio receiver with prominent dials, a frequency display, and a cross-vented back panel. Features include a carrying handle, multiple control knobs, and clear 'ASTRAL' branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main control interface, including the volume dial, tuning knob, frequency display, buttons, and the 'ASTRAL' brand.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights three circular speaker or light elements stacked vertically, with minimal other features visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays a cross-shaped ventilation grille, a large '99' label, technical markings, and a power switch.
description_view_3: The right side view is mostly solid and featureless, with only the edge of the volume dial and handle visible.
